title: Lucilia burkartii

This classification is based on its physical characteristics and genetic relationships with other species in the Callionymidae family. The genus Lucilia is part of the order Perciformes, which is a diverse group of fish that includes over 40% of all fish species. The family Callionymidae is further divided into several subfamilies and genera, with Lucilia burkartii being one of the species within this group. By classifying Lucilia burkartii within the Callionymidae family, scientists can better understand its evolutionary history and relationships with other species.
